verdict.evidence: Three fabricated additions were found: (1) The parenthetical example 'e.g., transit or logistical support' is not mentioned in the source document. (2) The characterization of the proposal as a 'technical adjustment' is not stated in the source. (3) The claim about Finland 'maintaining its long-standing non-nuclear stance' is an editorial addition not grounded in the source text — while the source says Finland is not seeking nuclear weapons, it does not characterize this as a 'long-standing non-nuclear stance.'
